# AskSaul.ai

AskSaul.ai builds practical AI systems for businesses: AI assistants, workflow automation, voice agents, conversion websites/apps, and marketing automation. Built by Gregory Ringler in Denver, CO.

Primary offer: Get Your Automation Map — a practical diagnostic that identifies the 1–3 highest-leverage workflows to automate first.

Key URLs:
- /build-your-proposal — Get Your Automation Map
- /voice-agents — AI phone agents for missed and after-hours calls
- /voice-agents/waste — AI voice agents for dumpster rental and waste companies
- /ai-automation — self-hosted AI assistants and workflow automation
- /web-development — conversion websites and apps
- /marketing-engine — CRM, follow-up, and marketing automation

Full LLM context: https://asksaul.ai/llms-full.txt
Contact: saul3000bot@gmail.com · 970.343.9634
